records.ety: [F. comptent, p. pr. of compter to be in the competency of, LL. competere to strive after together, to agree with; hence, to be fit. See Compete.]

defs: Answering to all requirements; adequate; sufficient; suitable; capable; legally qualified; fit.
Rightfully or properly belonging; incident; -- followed by to.
quotes: That is the privilege of the infinite Author of things, . . . but is not competent to any finite being.
